data.title: Bessor Minerals Terminates Jagrite Graphite Project Acquisition to Refocus on Core Assets
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Bessor Minerals Inc ( (TSE:BST) ).

Bessor Minerals Inc. has terminated its asset purchase agreement to acquire the Jagrite Graphite Project near Bella Coola, British Columbia, ending a proposed expansion into graphite exploration. The move signals a renewed concentration on the company’s core exploration assets at Golden Eagle in the Yukon and Redhill in British Columbia, along with its existing royalty interest in Artemis Gold’s Blackwater Mine, which may streamline capital allocation and operational focus for stakeholders.

More about Bessor Minerals Inc

Bessor Minerals Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing its Golden Eagle property in the Yukon and the Redhill volcanogenic massive sulphide deposit in British Columbia. The company also holds a 1% net smelter return royalty on certain claims within the Blackwater Mine operated by Artemis Gold Inc., providing additional exposure to precious metals production.

Average Trading Volume: 43,788

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$938.6K

data.title: Sydbank Adjusts 2026 Interim Report Date and Confirms Financial Calendar
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sydbank A/S ( (GB:0MGE) ) has provided an announcement.

Sydbank A/S has issued a correction to its 2026 financial calendar, shifting the release date of its interim report for the first three quarters of 2026 from 4 November to 5 November. The bank has also confirmed the timing for all its preliminary financial announcements in 2026, stating that interim reports for Q1, the first half and Q1–Q3 will be published at 8:00 a.m. on 6 May, 26 August and 5 November, respectively, and made available on its Danish and international websites.

The clarified reporting schedule offers investors and other stakeholders greater visibility on when to expect key financial disclosures, supporting transparency and planning around Sydbank’s performance updates. The minor calendar adjustment underscores the bank’s attention to precise communication of its financial timetable, which is important for analysts and market participants who track its results closely.

More about Sydbank A/S

Sydbank A/S is a Danish banking group headquartered in Aabenraa, providing a range of financial services to retail and corporate customers. The bank operates primarily in Denmark and focuses on traditional banking products such as lending, deposits and related financial solutions.

See more data about 0MGE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6938) ) has issued an update.

Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd., a Hong Kong-listed Chinese life sciences company, plans to deepen employee and partner alignment with shareholder interests through equity-based incentives linked to its H shares. The group’s focus on life science innovation positions it to use share-based rewards to attract and retain talent and strategic service providers in a competitive biotech market.

The board has resolved to propose the adoption of an H share option scheme and an H share incentive scheme, both involving the issue of new H shares and designed to grant equity to employees, service providers and related entities. Implementation of these schemes is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming annual general meeting and listing approval for the new shares, with the company warning investors to exercise caution while the proposals remain pending.

More about Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd. Class H

Suzhou Ribo Life Science Co., Ltd. is a biotechnology company listed in Hong Kong that operates as a joint stock company in the People’s Republic of China, focusing on life sciences and related therapeutic and research applications. The company issues H shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, targeting international investors seeking exposure to China’s biopharmaceutical and life science sectors.

data.title: Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Proposes 2025 Final Dividend With Currency Option and Tax Guidance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co ( (HK:3618) ) has issued an update.

Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank has proposed a final ordinary dividend of RMB 1.1755 per 10 shares for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, with H-share holders able to receive payment in Hong Kong dollars or renminbi, subject to a later announcement on the HKD amount and key timetable details. The bank has also outlined its withholding tax arrangements for different categories of non-resident shareholders, clarifying applicable tax rates and responsibilities, which will be relevant for cross-border investors using the Hong Kong Stock Connect channels and may influence the net yield they receive from the payout.

Shareholders of record on 15 June 2026 will be entitled to the dividend, which is scheduled for payment on 27 July 2026, pending formal shareholder approval of the distribution. By maintaining a cash dividend with a currency option and providing detailed tax guidance, the bank underscores its intention to offer predictable returns and transparency to its international investor base amid ongoing regulatory and tax considerations for Chinese financial institutions listed in Hong Kong.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3618) stock is a Buy with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co stock, see the HK:3618 Stock Forecast page.

More about Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co

Chongqing Rural Commercial Bank Co., Ltd. is a mainland Chinese commercial bank listed in Hong Kong, serving retail and corporate customers with a focus on rural and regional financial services. Its H shares are traded under stock code 03618, attracting both domestic and international investors through the Hong Kong market.

data.title: Advanced Gold forms U.S. unit and launches NI 43-101 program at Nevada’s Silver Belle project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Advance United Holdings ( (TSE:AUEX) ) is now available.

Advanced Gold Exploration Inc. is expanding its footprint into the U.S. by creating a wholly owned subsidiary, to be called Silver Belle Resources LLC or a similar name, to manage recently acquired claims in Eureka County, Nevada. The move builds on the company’s strategy of leveraging historically worked properties and complements its Canadian gold and copper portfolio.

The company has mandated Arizona-based geological consultancy ProDeMin USA LLC, led by Dr. Craig Gibson, to run a Phase 1 exploration program and produce an NI 43-101 technical report on the Silver Belle Project. The work, set to begin in mid-to-late April 2026, will include detailed mapping, systematic sampling, advanced field technology and data integration, aiming to modernize historic data, validate high-grade carbonate replacement deposit potential and lay a compliant technical foundation that could position Silver Belle as a significant CRD-style silver and base-metal project in one of Nevada’s most productive mineral belts.

Historical smelter returns from 1937 indicate exceptionally high silver grades and significant lead, zinc, copper and antimony content at Silver Belle, reinforcing its potential within an antimony-enriched segment of the regional CRD belt. The technical report, expected about two months after the program starts, will guide future drilling and resource-definition decisions, potentially reshaping Advanced Gold’s growth profile and exposure to U.S. high-grade polymetallic exploration.

More about Advance United Holdings

Advanced Gold Exploration Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold and copper properties, primarily in Canada. The company specializes in identifying and acquiring undervalued projects with significant historical work, aiming to enhance their economic value and deliver both immediate and long-term returns to partners and shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 23,228

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.88M

See more insights into AUEX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Eastnine Secures SBTi Validation for Net-Zero Climate Targets by 2040
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Eastnine AB ( (SE:EAST) ) has issued an announcement.

Eastnine AB, a Swedish office-focused real estate company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm Mid Cap, operates a portfolio of office properties in rapidly expanding European markets. The group is increasingly integrating climate objectives into its business model as it seeks to strengthen its long-term competitiveness and asset value in the real estate sector.

The company has had its near- and long-term climate targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative, confirming that its decarbonisation pathway is aligned with limiting global warming to 1.5°C. Eastnine is committing to net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across its property portfolio and value chain by 2040, with interim 2030 and 2040 targets for deep cuts in Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions and a halt to new fossil fuel equipment, signalling a more rigorous transition plan that could influence tenant relationships, capital allocation and its positioning among climate-conscious investors.

To deliver on these targets, Eastnine plans to focus on energy efficiency upgrades, a shift to renewable energy, and lowering embodied carbon in renovations and tenant improvements. The company also highlights collaboration with tenants and suppliers as central to reducing emissions across its value chain, which may enhance operational resilience and align the portfolio more closely with tightening regulatory and market expectations on sustainable real estate.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:EAST) stock is a Hold with a SEK47.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eastnine AB stock, see the SE:EAST Stock Forecast page.

More about Eastnine AB

Eastnine AB is a Swedish real estate company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm’s Mid Cap segment, focused on providing office properties in some of the fastest growing markets in Europe. The company operates in the real estate sector and aims to position itself as a leading office landlord by combining property management with a strong sustainability and climate strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 345,527

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK4.24B

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust Updates S-11 With 2025 Governance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A ( (BHM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bluerock Homes Trust updated its effective S-11 registration on March 12, 2026 to incorporate audited 2025 financial statements, governance details and Part III disclosures from its upcoming 2026 proxy, and outlined a stable leadership slate led by founder and CEO R. Ramin Kamfar with a board that is 20% female and 80% ethnically diverse. The filing details the company’s board committees, director compensation, equity incentive capacity, related-party management and DST program fee flows, and significant insider and 5% shareholder ownership, giving investors clearer visibility into how management is paid, how capital is allocated through affiliates, and how governance and compliance structures operated through year-end 2025.

The company reported $10.5 million of base management fees and $4.0 million of operating expense reimbursements to its external manager for 2025, plus growing DST acquisition and asset management fees and a series of cost-sharing and joint-venture arrangements with manager affiliates. It also disclosed extensive stock ownership guidelines, anti-hedging and pledging controls, a clawback policy for incentive fees, and full compliance with Section 16 filings, while confirming Grant Thornton LLP’s continued role as auditor with $674,000 in 2025 audit fees and no incentive fees paid to the manager for 2024–2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHM) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A stock, see the BHM Stock Forecast page.

More about Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. is an externally managed real estate investment trust focused on residential properties, including multifamily and build-to-rent communities, primarily in the United States. The company operates through an affiliated manager and related entities, leverages a Delaware statutory trust (DST) program and joint ventures, and uses equity incentive plans to align management and director interests with shareholders.

data.title: Alien Metals’ JV Kicks Off RC Drilling at High-Grade Elizabeth Hill Silver Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Alien Metals Ltd ( (GB:UFO) ) is now available.

Alien Metals said joint venture partner West Coast Silver has begun a 4,000m reverse circulation drilling campaign at the high-grade Elizabeth Hill Silver Project near Karratha in Western Australia’s Pilbara. The programme targets shallow extensions of silver mineralisation along the Munni Munni Fault, building on 2025 high-grade results to grow the project’s footprint and support West Coast Silver’s first mineral resource estimate and future economic studies.

All planned holes are designed to intersect the key fault zone within about 150 metres of surface, a depth considered conducive to potential open-pit, lower-cost development if sufficient resources are defined. For Alien Metals, which retains a 30% free-carried interest in Elizabeth Hill, successful drilling could enhance its portfolio value and strengthen its exposure to silver alongside its core iron ore developments in the region.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:UFO) stock is a Hold with a £0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alien Metals Ltd stock, see the GB:UFO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UFO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UFO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative free cash flow) despite improved 2024 loss and cash-burn trends and low leverage. Technicals are comparatively strong with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation remains constrained by the company’s loss-making profile and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on UFO stock, click here.

More about Alien Metals Ltd

Alien Metals Ltd is a London AIM-listed minerals exploration and development company focused primarily on iron ore and precious and base metals projects in Western Australia’s Pilbara region. Its key asset is the 90%-owned Hancock Iron Ore Project, alongside interests in the Brockman and Vivash iron ore projects and minority stakes in the Munni Munni PGM project and the high-grade Elizabeth Hill Silver Project via joint ventures.

data.title: Tang Palace Warns of Deeper 2025 Loss as Revenue Falls and Store Count Shrinks
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited ( (HK:1181) ) is now available.

Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited, a Chinese restaurant operator with a portfolio of self-owned and joint-venture outlets, reported weaker results for the year ended 31 December 2025 as it navigated a challenging dining market. The group’s revenues depend heavily on foot traffic and consumer confidence, making it sensitive to shifts in discretionary spending and cost pressures across the food and beverage industry.

For 2025, the company’s revenue declined 12.4% year on year to RMB894.6 million, while gross profit fell 12.6% to RMB589.8 million with gross margin broadly stable at 65.9%. The loss attributable to shareholders widened sharply to RMB59.1 million, translating to a net loss margin of 6.6% and a higher basic loss per share of 5.50 RMB cents, and the board proposed no final dividend after paying none at interim.

The group also reduced its store footprint, operating 30 self-owned and 12 joint-venture restaurants at year-end versus 32 and 17, respectively, a sign of ongoing network rationalisation. Additional pressure came from a larger negative fair value change on financial assets and losses from joint ventures, highlighting both operational headwinds and investment-related drag on earnings that may concern investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1181) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:1181 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited

Tang Palace (China) Holdings Limited operates a chain of self-owned and joint-venture restaurants in mainland China, focusing on Chinese cuisine and related catering services. The group targets the mid- to upper-end dining market, and its performance is closely tied to consumer spending trends and operating costs in the restaurant sector.

Average Trading Volume: 208,590

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$210.9M
